examples: "Leigh," he said seizing my arm to hold me back.
"Pirates," cried John, seizing his Sunday hat, "let us go at once."
Heidi seizing his arm, shouted, full of indignation, "You mustn't hurt him!"
Yet in Dublin, some artisans and clothing designers are seizing the downturn as an opportunity for rebirth.
Recognising when the time is right, and seizing the opportunity is absolutely key to success.
